subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Desired One, Who hath ordained the glad tidings of His friends' well-being to be among the choicest bounties of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که مژده صحت دوستانرا از بهترین نعمتهای عالم مقرر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @business; financial; property matters, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @justice and mercy
